$comment: Test-gate map for Air Action Sports. Maps do-not-touch source paths (per docs/audit/06-do-not-touch.md) to the test paths that lock their behavior. Rule: before editing any path under `gates`, run the listed test paths and confirm they pass. After your edit, re-run them — they must still pass. If a test reveals current behavior conflicting with audit-documented behavior, STOP and ask the operator. The `uncovered` section enumerates do-not-touch files without tests yet — their `audit_tests_prescribed` arrays form the post-M1 punch list per docs/audit/09-test-coverage.md. When adding tests for a gated path in a future batch, also append the new test paths to the relevant `gates[<path>].tests` array.

requireCapability(key) — Hono middleware factory; lazy-loads capabilities onto user; 401/403 with requiresCapability hint
userCapabilities(user) — sync; backward-compat alias for the M4 stub's import surface

useWidgetData (fetch + poll + visibility-aware)

SIDEBAR registry (Surface 1 IA per docs/m4-discovery/sidebar-ia-audit.md — Home / Today / Events / Bookings / Customers / Rentals / Roster / Scan / Settings group with 10 sub-items; Rentals/Roster/Scan restored to standing nav per M5 B0 D10)

userHasCapabilityStub (M5 B0 stub mapping capability → minimum legacy role; M5 B2 swaps to DB-backed check)

covers: pickRecallableBookings (filter customer history to most recent N paid/comp; tolerates camelCase + snake_case timestamp keys)
formatBookingHint (one-line recall summary for AdminNewBooking)
formatRelativeAge (just now / minutes / hours / days / weeks / months / years)
commandsFromSidebar (derive flat command list from SIDEBAR; honors getVisibleItems predicates for dynamic todayActive + requiresFlag)
filterCommands (case-insensitive substring match; prefix-priority sort; defensive against non-array/non-string-label inputs)
IRS_1099_THRESHOLD_CENTS (60000 = $600.00 — IRS 1099-NEC reporting threshold)
requires1099 / previousTaxYear / shouldAutoLockToday — pure helpers exposed for testability + UI use
formatIrs1099Csv / formatGenericCsv — pure CSV formatters used by the /export endpoint and the bookkeeper rollup
aggregate1099TotalsForYear (env, taxYear) — I/O wrapper that powers GET /api/admin/1099-thresholds and GET /export
getYearLock / lockTaxYear — I/O wrappers used by GET / and POST /lock-year + the auto-lock cron sweep

runTaxYearAutoLockSweep — nightly cron wired into worker/index.js 03:00 UTC dispatch; auto-locks the previous tax year on March 1+ and sends w9_reminder to threshold-meeting recipients with missing legal_name/EIN
EVENT_DAY_WINDOW_MS (30-hour window starting 00:00 UTC of event date_iso) + ACTIVITY_KINDS (4-element frozen list mapping to 0037 schema columns)
randomEventDaySessionId / isEventActive / eventDayWindowExpired — pure helpers exposed for testability + middleware
startEventDaySession / getActiveEventDaySession / getEventDaySessionById — I/O wrappers used by the session route + middleware
endEventDaySession (writes audit row; reason bound positionally) + bumpActivityCounter (whitelist-validated kind → column mapping for R13/R14/R16) + touchActivity (heartbeat)
requireEventDayAuth — Hono middleware chains portal-cookie verify -> session lookup -> portal_session ownership check -> event-window enforcement (auto-ends on event_window_closed)
parseEventDayCookie / setEventDayCookie / clearEventDayCookie + EVENT_DAY_COOKIE_NAME constant
POST /api/event-day/sessions/start (portal-cookie + event-staffed gate; idempotent reuse if active session exists for person+event)
POST /api/event-day/sessions/heartbeat (touch last_activity_at; gated by requireEventDayAuth)
POST /api/event-day/sessions/end (set signed_out_at + clear cookie + audit; gated by requireEventDayAuth)
GET /api/event-day/sessions/me (counters shape used by HQ dashboard in R15)
FIELD_RENTAL_STATUSES + transition matrix (8-state graph with operator-confirmed back-reverts sent→draft + agreed→sent)
allowedTransitions / validateStatusTransition — pure helpers used by /:id/status + /:id/cancel + lifecycle audits
parseAddonFees — JSON or array; rejects >20 items, label >100 chars, non-integer or negative cents
computePricing — server-trusted: total = site_fee + sum(addons.cents) - discount + tax; rejects negative total
formatFieldRental / formatFieldRentalContact — DB row → API shape with PII masking (notes / notes_sensitive / contact email+phone)
GET /api/admin/field-rentals (list with status/site/customer/engagement/coi filters; q PII-aware free-text search; pagination + order whitelist)
GET /api/admin/field-rentals/:id (detail + contacts + site/customer JOIN; PII unmask audits customer_pii.unmasked)
POST /api/admin/field-rentals (conflict-detection 409; bypass_conflict cap + acknowledgeConflicts override; server-trusted pricing recompute)
PUT /api/admin/field-rentals/:id (rejects status/schedule changes; recomputes total_cents on pricing-input change; archived rejected)
POST /api/admin/field-rentals/:id/status (non-cancel/non-refund transitions only; validateStatusTransition gate)
POST /api/admin/field-rentals/:id/cancel (sets cancelled_at + cancellation_reason + deposit_retained; audit field_rental.cancelled)
POST /api/admin/field-rentals/:id/archive (terminal-status-only; soft-archive; audit field_rental.archived)
POST /api/admin/field-rentals/:id/reschedule (re-runs conflict check with excludeFieldRentalId; same bypass override path)
POST /api/admin/field-rental-documents (multipart upload + magic-byte sniff via worker/lib/magicBytes.js; 10MB cap; R2 key field_rentals/<rental>/<doc>.<ext>)
kind='coi' required metadata (carrier/policy/amount/effective/expires); denormalizes field_rentals.coi_status='received' + coi_expires_at + requirements_coi_received=1
kind='agreement' requires live SUA template (returns 409 with hint when none exists); captures sua_body_sha256_snapshot for integrity check; denormalizes requirements_agreement_signed=1
Versioning: new agreement or coi upload retires prior live row (retired_at = now)
GET /api/admin/field-rental-documents?rental_id=… (list; COI carrier/policy/amount fields masked unless field_rentals.coi.read_pii)
GET /api/admin/field-rental-documents/:docId/download (proxies R2 bytes; audit field_rental_document.downloaded with ip_address)
POST /api/admin/field-rental-documents/:docId/retire (manual retire without replacement)
POST /api/admin/field-rental-payments (per-kind capability gating: deposit_record / balance_record / write; kind='refund' rejected — refunds only via /refund endpoint)
Aggregate sync on received: kind=deposit/full syncs field_rentals.deposit_*; kind=balance/full syncs balance_* (full syncs BOTH)
Auto-transition rental agreed → paid on first received deposit/balance/full payment (writes status_changed audit)
Refused 409 on cancelled/refunded parent rental (except kind='refund' which is already rejected upstream)
GET /api/admin/field-rental-payments?rental_id=… (gated by field_rentals.read.financials; reference + notes PII-gated)
PUT /api/admin/field-rental-payments/:paymentId (pending→received transition triggers aggregate sync + auto-flip; refunded/void rejected)
POST /api/admin/field-rental-payments/:paymentId/refund (canonical refund flow; validates amount ≤ original; reverseAggregateOnRefund re-binds to newer received row OR clears aggregate)
POST /api/bookings/checkout
POST /api/bookings/quote
